name: Taeko Okajima
description: Taeko Okajima is 27, lives in Tokyo and works in a big company. She then decides to take a break and go to Yamagata Prefecture, where her brother-in-law lives. On her way there, she sees memories of her as 5th grader. While in Yamagata, she works hard and while there, she starts re-considering her choice of life. (Source: Wikipedia)

description: A salary man who writes mystery novels during his free time.

name: Umi Ryuuzaki
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2'') Umi Ryuuzaki is the Magic Knight of Water. Despite being a beautiful and elegant girl, with a tall model-like figure and long, flowing blue hair, she actually has a short temper, and was initially shown to be the most skeptical of the three. Later on, however, between the three Magic Knights, she took on the mantle of the Big Sister and proved to be very protective of her two best friends, Fuu Hououji and Hikaru Shidou.

She wanted to be veterinarian and because of that, in her monster form she grew fox ears and is able to hear and feel the feelings of animals. (Source: Gleipnir Wiki)

name: Edna
description: __Height:__ 145 cm A young seraph who utilizes earth-based seraphic artes. Distrustful of others, she often displays a cold, grown-up attitude, and it is hard to read her true feelings. She is sharp-tongued and likes to confuse people and put them at her mercy. She is extremely calm, and becomes emotional only about her older brother who is her only family. Her mascot, a mysterious “Normin,” hangs from her favorite umbrella.

name: Manamusume
description: **Occupation:** Spy **Affiliation:** Lamplight **Skills:** She is skilled in disguises, and can even disguise herself as a man without being detected. Grete is one of the main protagonists in the Spy Classroom series.
